name: istv-reel-editor
description: Cross-platform desktop editor that turns a documentary into 9:16 reels.
author: ISTV

build.//asarUnpack: The ffmpeg/ffprobe binaries can't be exec'd from inside app.asar; ffmpeg.js rewrites their path to app.asar.unpacked, so they MUST be unpacked here. Export renders entirely in-process via the bundled Node engine (src/main/mediaEngine.cjs) — no Python is spawned, so nothing outside desktop/ needs to be packaged.
